nasb.text: “Thus we took the land at that time from the hand of the two kings of the Amorites who were beyond the Jordan, from the valley of Arnon to Mount Hermon

esv.text: So we took the land at that time out of the hand of the two kings of the Amorites who were beyond the Jordan, from the Valley of the Arnon to Mount Hermon

cnv.text: 那時，我們從約旦河東亞摩利人的兩個王手裡，把從亞嫩谷直到黑門山的地奪了過來，

ccb.text: 于是，我们攻占了约旦河东两个亚摩利王的土地，从亚嫩谷一直到黑门山——
